headline: A Look At M&T Bank (MTB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Why M&T Bank stock is drawing fresh attention now M&T Bank (MTB) is back on many investors’ watchlists after recent trading showed a 2.2% one-day decline and a 6.8% drop over the past week, prompting closer scrutiny of the shares. See our latest analysis for M&T Bank. Beyond this week’s pullback, M&T Bank’s recent 14.2% 1 month share price decline contrasts with a 22.9% 1 year total shareholder return and a 77.1% 3 year total shareholder return. This suggests that short term momentum is...

headline: Newsweek and Statista Recognize America’s Most Charitable Companies 2026
summary: 300 companies honored for leadership in giving, volunteering and community impactNEW YORK, March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Newsweek, in partnership with Statista, today announced America’s Most Charitable Companies 2026, a new ranking that recognizes 300 U.S. companies for outstanding corporate philanthropy, employee volunteering, and investment in communities across the country.
